Settings

Developed By:

Nathan Burrows

nburrows@eplus.com 501.278.1824

"Ten years at ePlus and there's a lot to be grateful for — the team, the culture, the family-first mentality. As I grew my business and expanded into a team model, I kept hitting the same wall: our data and systems are isolated, and it takes reps years to find their rhythm.

Over the past year I've gotten deep into AI and what it can do for both customers and reps, and I took that as an opportunity to pull our systems, processes, and the inside knowledge that usually lives in someone's head into one place — giving reps more control, more insight, more command over their business.

Started with renewals. Has since grown into overall sales reporting, commission tracking, and what I think might be the most important piece — client-facing material. My hope is that this becomes a tool you actually leverage, and that it keeps ePlus driving client success.

Thanks for checking it out. — Nathan

Cloud Sync

checking…

Encrypts your settings, API keys, and data caches with your password, then syncs them across machines via your local OneDrive folder. Authentication opens in your browser so your password manager can fill it in. Auto-saves while you work; pulls fresh data on launch.

OneDrive isn't detected on this machine. Install OneDrive and relaunch OneSourceCMD to enable cloud sync.
Signed in as
—
Switch to a different profile
Sync is not configured on this machine. Sign in to an existing profile, or create a new one — authentication opens in your browser.
Cloud sync is only available in the desktop app.

Team Database

checking…

Customer aliases, order overrides, account caches, and search history sync across team members via a shared OneDrive folder. Personal data (commissions, API keys, rep profile) stays on your account only.

Team sync requires cloud sync to be enabled. Sign in to a personal profile above first.
Active team
—
Members
Recent changes (last 100)
loading…
Team detected in your OneDrive: —. Join with the team passphrase your team owner shared.

API Keys

Stored encrypted in your local AppData via macOS Keychain / Windows DPAPI. Saving a key restarts the proxy so it picks up the new value.

🔑 macOS keychain prompt: The first time you save a key, macOS will ask for permission to access "OneSourceCMD Safe Storage" in your keychain. Click Always Allow — this lets the app decrypt your keys on every launch without prompting again. Clicking Allow (once) will prompt you each restart.
API key management is only available in the desktop app.
Clear all keys — wipes keys.enc in one shot. Use before sharing the app or handing the machine to someone else.

Launch at login

Open OneSourceCMD automatically when you sign in. Window stays hidden in the menu bar / system tray until you click the tray icon.

Launch-at-login is only available in the desktop app.

Onboarding tour

Re-run the first-time walkthrough (CRM bookmarklet, NICE bookmarklet, SalesTrak data request). Your data isn't touched.

Reset onboarding

Wipes onboarding state, all cached data (NICE / ST / CRM / rep‑profile), and encrypted API keys. Replaces with fresh sample data. The app will quit and relaunch.

Real uploads + API keys will be erased — re-upload your exports and re-enter keys to restore.

Onboarding reset is only available in the desktop app.
AI Assistant
Shows the AI panel and FAB button. State persists until data is cleared.

AI Model

Key is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage. It's decrypted in-memory only when a request is made and sent to the local proxy — never directly to Anthropic from your browser.

Tools

Web search

Cascading backend: Ollama → Brave → Tavily. Keys live in .env on disk and are loaded by the local proxy — never in the browser. Start the proxy by double-clicking start-proxy.command.
Advanced

MCP servers

No MCP servers configured. (Future: Dynamics CRM.)

Data

If the AI assistant can't see your data even though you've uploaded files, click above to manually pull from IndexedDB into STATE.
Downloads the same JSON the AI assistant sees in every prompt — app-validated customers, renewals, and recent lines. Useful for review, debugging, and as fine-tune training data.

Account

Choose which sales rep's data you're viewing.

Data Inspection

Tools for auditing what got captured during import.

Toggle which canonical columns appear in the table. Settings persist across reloads.

Imported Headers
